person.name: Alice Gifford
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Alice Gifford (Born about 1360, in Yester, Peebles-Shire, Scotland) She was the second daughter of Sir Hugh Giffard, (Gifford) of Yester by his wife Johanna Douglas. While a child she inherited one fourth part of her fathers estate on his death about 1365.

Alice, married Sir Thomas Boyd of Kilmarnock. By this union (Sir Thomas) acquired a large fortune.

«b»They had one son: «/b»
1.) Sir Thomas Boyd, "dnus de Kylmornowe", (died 1432) who was one of the sureties, or hostages, for King James I (who had been held by the English as prisoner for 19 years).

She died after 1410.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Gifford於大約1360年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight39歲，母親Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester47歲。她於1384年與Thomas Boyd在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特也斯特 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1410年在蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Gifford于大约1360年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight39岁，母亲Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester47岁。她于1384年与Thomas Boyd在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾也斯特也斯特 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1410年在苏格兰雷福福爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Gifford was born about 1360, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight, was 39 and her mother, Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester, was 47. She married Thomas Boyd in 1384, in Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1410, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Gifford est née environ 1360, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Boyd en 1384, à Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1410, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Gifford um 1360 in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight 39 und ihre Mutter Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester 47. Sie hat 1384 in Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Thomas Boyd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1410 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gifford è nata il circa 1360 nel Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Boyd nel 1384, nel Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1410, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Giffordが約1360年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knightは39歳，母Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yesterは47歳であった。1384年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアイエスターイエスター カストルでThomas Boydと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1410年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Gifford(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1384년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 예스터 예스터 카스틀에서 Thomas Boyd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1410년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gifford nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Boyd em 1384, em Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1410, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Gifford родилась около 1360 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Giffard of Yester, Knight было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanna Douglas, Lady Yester, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Boyd в 1384 г. в местности иестир кастл, иестир, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1410 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет.
